title: School Library
passage:
Our school library is one of the 1)________ (big) places in our school. It is on the second floor of the teaching building and 2)________ (open) from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. every day except weekends.

There are all kinds of books in the library, such as storybooks, science books and history books. We can borrow up to five books at a time and keep them for two weeks. If we can't finish reading them on time, we can 3)________ (return) to the library to renew (续借) them.

Miss Li is the librarian (图书管理员). She is very kind and 4)________ (help). Whenever we can't find the books we need, she always helps us 5)________ (polite). She often tells us that reading can make us 6)________ (smart) and open up our eyes to the world.

I go to the library every Tuesday afternoon. I usually choose books about science because I am 7)________ (interest) in space and nature. Last week, I borrowed a book about Mars (火星). I 8)________ (read) it for three days and I find it very interesting. I 9)________ (finish) it next week and share it with my classmates.

The library is a quiet and comfortable place to study. It's a good way 10)________ (spend) our free time and learn new things.

questions.analysis: one of + the + 形容词最高级 + 可数名词复数，表“最……之一”，big的最高级为biggest。
表示“营业/开放状态”用be open，主语it为单数，故用is open。
情态动词can后接动词原形go。
and连接并列形容词，kind（友善的）和helpful（乐于助人的）均作表语。
副词修饰动词help，polite的副词形式为politely。
隐含比较，“阅读使我们更聪明”，用比较级smarter。
be interested in是固定搭配，表“对……感兴趣”。
for three days是现在完成时标志，主语I用have read。
next week是将来时间，用一般将来时will finish。
a good way to do sth.是固定搭配，不定式作后置定语。

title: Protecting Wild Animals
passage:
Wild animals are our friends. They play an important role in nature. However, many wild animals 1)________ (become) in danger now because of human activities.

Some people cut down too many trees, so animals lose their homes. Others hunt (猎杀) animals for their fur or meat. This 2)________ (make) the number of wild animals smaller and smaller. For example, pandas 3)________ (live) mainly on bamboo, but bamboo forests are getting smaller. So pandas have less food to eat.

It's our duty 4)________ (protect) wild animals. First, we should stop cutting down trees and build more nature reserves (自然保护区). Second, we should tell people not 5)________ (buy) products made from wild animals. Third, we can join animal protection clubs and learn more about 6)________ (they) living habits.

Last month, our class 7)________ (organize) a speech competition about protecting wild animals. I spoke about tigers and 8)________ (win) the first prize. My teacher said my speech was 9)________ (good) than others because it was full of facts.

If everyone cares about wild animals, our world 10)________ (be) more beautiful. Let's take action now to save our animal friends.

questions.analysis: now表示动作正在进行，用现在进行时are becoming。
主语this是单数，谓语动词用第三人称单数形式makes。
描述客观事实用一般现在时，主语pandas是复数，用live。
It's one's duty to do sth.是固定句型，不定式作真正主语。
tell sb. not to do sth.是固定搭配，表“告诉某人不要做某事”。
形容词性物主代词修饰名词living habits，用their。
last month是过去时间，用一般过去式organized。
and连接并列谓语，spoke是过去式，win也用过去式won。
than是比较级标志，good的比较级为better。
if引导条件状语从句，遵循“主将从现”，主句用will be。

title: Using Smart Phones at School
passage:
Smart phones are very popular among teenagers now. However, our school has a rule that students can't use smart phones at school. Many students 1)________ (not agree) with this rule at first.

Some students think smart phones can help them 2)________ (study). For example, they can look up new words or check information quickly. But teachers say students often use phones to play games or chat with friends during class, which 3)________ (affect) their study.

Last month, our school did a survey (调查) about using phones at school. Over 60% of the students said they 4)________ (spend) more than one hour a day on phones. Only 10% of them used phones 5)________ (main) for study.

After the survey, the school held a meeting to talk about the rule. Teachers and students discussed the problem together. Finally, we decided to make a new rule: students can bring phones to school, but they must 6)________ (keep) them in their schoolbags during class. They can use them only after school or during breaks if 7)________ (necessary).

Since the new rule came out, things 8)________ (change) a lot. Students pay more attention to their lessons in class. My deskmate used to play phone games every day, but now he 9)________ (read) books after class. He said he 10)________ (find) reading more interesting than playing games.

questions.analysis: at first（起初）是过去时间，用一般过去时的否定形式didn't agree。
help sb. (to) do sth.是固定搭配，可省略to，用动词原形study。
which指代前文整件事，谓语动词用第三人称单数affects。
said后接宾语从句，主句是过去时，从句也用过去式spent。
副词修饰动词used，main的副词形式为mainly（主要地）。
情态动词must后接动词原形keep。
if necessary是固定表达，表“如果有必要的话”，省略了it is。
since（自从）是现在完成时标志，主语things用have changed。
now表示现在的习惯，主语he是单数，用一般现在时reads。
said后接宾语从句，主句是过去时，从句用过去式found。

title: The Spring Festival
passage:
The Spring Festival is the most important festival in China. It usually comes in January or February. People start to prepare for it a few weeks 1)________ (before) it comes.

Cleaning the house is an important part of the preparation. People clean every corner of the house to sweep away bad luck. They also buy new clothes and lots of food. On New Year's Eve, all family members get together 2)________ (have) a big dinner. They eat dumplings, fish and other delicious food. The fish means “surplus (余)” in Chinese, which 3)________ (bring) good luck for the new year.

After dinner, people watch the Spring Festival Gala (春晚) on TV or play cards. They stay up late to welcome the new year. At midnight, they set off fireworks (烟花) to make the night 4)________ (bright). On the first day of the new year, people wear new clothes and visit their relatives. Children get red envelopes 5)________ (fill) with money from their parents and grandparents.

I love the Spring Festival because it's a time for family reunion. Last year, my family 6)________ (go) to my grandparents' home in the countryside. We 7)________ (cook) dumplings together and my grandma told me many interesting stories about the Spring Festival. I 8)________ (receive) a lot of red envelopes and I used the money 9)________ (buy) some books.

This year, we 10)________ (celebrate) the Spring Festival in Shanghai. I'm looking forward to it very much.

questions.analysis: 表示“在节日到来前几周准备”，用before（在……之前）。
不定式作目的状语，“聚在一起的目的是吃年夜饭”，用to have。
which指代前文“鱼代表余”这件事，谓语动词用第三人称单数brings。
隐含比较，“放烟花让夜晚更亮”，用比较级brighter。
过去分词作后置定语，red envelopes filled with money表“装满钱的红包”。
last year是过去时间，用一般过去式went。
描述过去的动作，用一般过去式cooked。
承接前文过去的语境，用过去式received。
use sth. to do sth.是固定搭配，表“用某物做某事”。
this year表示将来的动作，用一般将来时will celebrate。

title: Running for Health
passage:
Running is one of the easiest and cheapest ways to keep healthy. You don't need any special equipment, just a pair of 1)________ (comfort) running shoes.

I start running every morning six months ago. At first, I could only run for five minutes because I was out of breath (气喘吁吁) easily. But I didn't give up. I ran a little longer every day. Now I can run for 30 minutes without 2)________ (stop). Running makes me 3)________ (strong) and more energetic. I used to feel tired in class, but now I can concentrate better on my lessons.

Running is also a good way to relax. When I feel stressed about my study, I go for a run in the park. The fresh air and beautiful scenery make me forget all my problems. My father also likes running. He 4)________ (run) every morning for ten years. He says running helps him keep fit and he 5)________ (never be) sick in the past five years.

Last week, our school held a running race. I 6)________ (take) part in the 800-meter race. I was nervous before the race, but my classmates cheered for me loudly. I tried my best and 7)________ (finish) third. I was very happy because it was my first time to get a prize in a sports competition. My PE teacher said I 8)________ (do) a good job and encouraged me 9)________ (keep) running.

If you want to keep healthy, why not try running? It's a great sport and it 10)________ (make) your life better.

questions.analysis: 形容词修饰名词running shoes，comfortable（舒适的）符合语境。
without是介词，后接动名词stopping。
and连接并列比较级，more energetic对应stronger（更强壮的）。
for ten years是现在完成时标志，主语he用has run。
in the past five years是现在完成时标志，用has never been。
last week是过去时间，用一般过去式took。
and连接并列谓语，tried是过去式，finish也用过去式finished。
said后接宾语从句，主句是过去时，从句用过去式did。
encourage sb. to do sth.是固定搭配，表“鼓励某人做某事”。
描述客观事实，主语it是单数，用一般现在时makes。

title: Volunteering in a Community
passage:
Volunteering is a meaningful activity. It not only helps others but also makes us feel happy. Last summer, I joined a volunteer club and 1)________ (work) in my community for two weeks.

My first job was to help clean the community park. There was a lot of trash (垃圾) on the grass and in the lake. I 2)________ (pick) up plastic bottles and paper with other volunteers. We also planted some young trees to make the park 3)________ (green). After cleaning, the park looked much 4)________ (nice) than before. The old people in the community thanked us and said we 5)________ (do) a great job.

Then I helped look after the children in the community center. Their parents were busy with work, so they couldn't take care of them during the day. I played games with the children and taught them 6)________ (draw) pictures. They were very lovely and I 7)________ (become) good friends with them soon. One little girl told me she wanted to be a volunteer too when she 8)________ (grow) up.

Volunteering taught me the importance of helping others. I learned to be patient and responsible. I 9)________ (volunteer) again this summer. I think everyone should spend some time 10)________ (do) volunteer work. Small actions can make a big difference to our community.

questions.analysis: last summer是过去时间，joined和worked并列作谓语，用过去式。
描述过去的动作，用一般过去式picked。
make + 宾语 + 形容词原级作宾补，make the park green表“让公园变绿”。
than是比较级标志，nice的比较级为nicer。
said后接宾语从句，主句是过去时，从句用过去式did。
teach sb. to do sth.是固定搭配，表“教某人做某事”。
承接前文过去的语境，用过去式became。
when引导时间状语从句，遵循“主将从现”，从句用一般现在时grow。
this summer表示将来的动作，用一般将来时will volunteer。
spend time (in) doing sth.是固定搭配，动名词作宾语。

title: A Trip to the Ocean Park
passage:
Last Sunday, my family and I went to the Ocean Park in Shanghai. We left home early in the morning and took the subway there. It 1)________ (take) us about 40 minutes to get to the park.

When we arrived, there were already a lot of people at the gate. We bought tickets and went in. First, we visited the dolphin show. The dolphins were very smart and they could do many tricks (特技), such as jumping through hoops (圈) and playing balls. All the people cheered for them loudly. I 2)________ (take) many photos of the dolphins with my phone.

Then we went to the aquarium (水族馆). We saw all kinds of sea animals, including sharks, sea turtles and colorful fish. The sharks were bigger than I 3)________ (think). I was a little scared at first, but soon I felt excited to see them so close. My little sister loved the sea turtles best because they looked very cute. She 4)________ (feed) them with some food under the guide's help.

At noon, we had lunch at a restaurant in the park. The food was a little expensive, but it was delicious. In the afternoon, we went to the roller coaster (过山车). It was very exciting and I 5)________ (scream) loudly when it went down. My mother didn't dare to ride it, so she waited for us at the entrance and 6)________ (drink) some coffee.

We left the park at 5 p.m. We were tired but happy. This trip was one of the 7)________ (happy) days in my life. I learned a lot about sea animals and 8)________ (enjoy) a wonderful time with my family. I 9)________ (remember) this trip forever. I hope we 10)________ (go) there again next year.

questions.analysis: It takes sb. some time to do sth.句型，描述过去的动作，用took。
描述过去的动作，用一般过去式took。
“鲨鱼比我原本想的更大”，think的动作发生在过去，用thought。
描述过去的动作，用一般过去式fed（feed的过去式）。
and连接并列谓语，went是过去式，scream也用过去式screamed。
and连接并列谓语，waited是过去式，drink也用过去式drank。
one of + the + 形容词最高级 + 可数名词复数，happy的最高级为happiest。
and连接并列谓语，learned是过去式，enjoy也用过去式enjoyed。
“会永远记得这次旅行”，用一般将来时will remember。
next year是将来时间，用一般将来时will go。

title: Learning to Cook
passage:
I used to hate cooking because I thought it was boring and difficult. But last month, I decided 1)________ (learn) to cook because my parents were always busy with work and I wanted to help them.

My mother taught me how to cook tomato and egg noodles, which is my favorite food. First, she showed me how 2)________ (cut) the tomatoes into small pieces. Then, I heated some oil in a pan and fried the eggs. The eggs smelled delicious and I felt a little proud of 3)________ (I). Next, I put the tomatoes into the pan and cooked them for a few minutes. Finally, I added some water and noodles. I cooked them for about 10 minutes and added some salt and sugar. When I finished, I served the noodles to my parents. They tasted the noodles and said they were 4)________ (tasty) than the noodles in the restaurant.

After that, I started to cook more often. I learned to cook fried rice, dumplings and other simple dishes. Every time I cooked, I made a few mistakes, but my parents never blamed (责备) me. They said practice 5)________ (make) perfect.

Last week, my best friend Lily came to my home. I cooked chicken soup for her. I followed the recipe (食谱) carefully and the soup turned out well. Lily said it was the 6)________ (good) chicken soup she had ever tasted. I was very happy to hear that. Cooking makes me feel independent and it's a good way 7)________ (show) my love to my family.

Now I enjoy cooking very much. I 8)________ (cook) for my family every weekend. I also want to learn more difficult dishes. I 9)________ (ask) my aunt to teach me how to cook mapo tofu next month. I believe I 10)________ (be) a good cook in the future.

questions.analysis: decide to do sth.是固定搭配，表“决定做某事”。
疑问词how+不定式作showed的宾语，用to cut。
feel proud of oneself是固定搭配，表“为自己感到骄傲”，用反身代词myself。
than是比较级标志，tasty的比较级为tastier。
practice makes perfect是谚语，表“熟能生巧”，用一般现在时makes。
she had ever tasted表示范围，用最高级best。
a good way to do sth.是固定搭配，不定式作后置定语。
every weekend表示习惯性动作，用一般现在时cook。
next month是将来时间，用一般将来时will ask。
in the future是将来时间，用一般将来时will be。

title: Protecting the Earth
passage:
The earth is our home and we must protect it. However, the environment is getting worse and worse now. Air pollution, water pollution and plastic pollution are big problems that we 1)________ (face) today.

Air pollution is mainly caused by cars and factories. The smoke from factories makes the air dirty, which is bad for our health. Many people get sick because of dirty air every year. To reduce air pollution, we should go to school or work by bike or on foot instead of 2)________ (drive) cars. We can also plant more trees because trees can take in harmful gases and make the air 3)________ (clean).

Water pollution is another serious problem. Many rivers and lakes are polluted by waste water from factories and homes. Fish in the polluted water die and people can't drink the water. We should stop pouring waste into water and save water in our daily life. For example, we can turn off the tap when we brush our teeth and reuse the water 4)________ (wash) vegetables to clean the floor.

Plastic pollution is also a big threat (威胁) to the earth. Plastic bags and bottles are everywhere. They take hundreds of years 5)________ (break) down. We should use cloth bags instead of plastic bags and recycle plastic bottles. Last month, our class 6)________ (collect) 200 plastic bottles and sold them to a recycling center. We used the money to buy some books for the school library.

Protecting the earth is everyone's duty. If we all take action now, our earth 7)________ (become) better and better. I 8)________ (tell) my friends and family about the importance of protecting the environment. I also join an environmental club at school and we 9)________ (hold) activities to raise people's awareness (意识) every month. I believe that small changes can make a big difference and our earth 10)________ (be) a beautiful place to live in forever.

questions.analysis: now表示动作正在进行，用现在进行时are facing。
instead of是介词短语，后接动名词driving。
隐含比较，“种树让空气更干净”，用比较级cleaner。
不定式作目的状语，reuse the water to wash vegetables表“重复用水洗菜”。
It takes sth. some time to do sth.句型，不定式作真正主语。
last month是过去时间，用一般过去式collected。
if引导条件状语从句，遵循“主将从现”，主句用will become。
强调动作已完成且对现在有影响，用现在完成时have told。
every month表示习惯性动作，用一般现在时hold。
“地球会永远是宜居的美丽地方”，用一般将来时will be。

title: A Surprise Birthday Party
passage:
Last Friday was my 14th birthday. I thought it would be an ordinary day, but it turned out to be a big surprise. My parents and friends planned a surprise party for me and I 1)________ (not know) anything about it before that day.

In the morning, my mother told me we would go to the mall to buy a new bike. I was very happy because I had wanted a bike for a long time. We left home at 10 a.m. and spent two hours in the mall. But my mother said the bike I liked was out of stock (缺货), so we had to go home. I felt a little sad and 2)________ (not talk) much on the way home.

When we opened the door of our house, all my friends jumped out and shouted “Happy Birthday!” to me. There were colorful balloons and a big birthday cake on the table. My best friend Lily gave me a book about space, which is my favorite subject. I 3)________ (be) so surprised that I couldn't say a word. My parents told me they 4)________ (plan) this party for a week and my friends helped them decorate (装饰) the house when I was out.

We sang the birthday song together and I made a wish before blowing out the candles. The cake was chocolate flavor, which is my favorite. We ate the cake and played many interesting games. My friend Tom told some funny jokes and we all 5)________ (laugh) loudly. I also received many other gifts, including a basketball and a new pen. I 6)________ (thank) everyone for their gifts and kindness.

The party lasted for three hours. When my friends left, I felt very happy and lucky. This was the best birthday I 7)________ (ever have). I 8)________ (learn) that my parents and friends love me very much. I 9)________ (keep) all the gifts and photos from the party as precious memories. I 10)________ (never forget) this wonderful day.

questions.analysis: before that day表示过去的时间，用一般过去时的否定形式didn't know。
and连接并列谓语，felt是过去式，talk也用过去式的否定形式didn't talk。
描述过去的状态，主语I用was。
“计划派对”的动作发生在told之前，用过去完成时had planned。
and连接并列谓语，told是过去式，laugh也用过去式laughed。
描述过去的动作，用一般过去式thanked。
ever是现在完成时标志，主语I用have ever had。
描述过去的收获，用一般过去式learned。
“会保存礼物和照片”，用一般将来时will keep。
“永远不会忘记这一天”，用一般将来时will never forget。

title: A School Library
passage:
Our school library is a great place for students to read and study. It is on the 1)________ (two) floor of the teaching building. There are all kinds of books, such as storybooks, science books and history books. Every morning, it 2)________ (open) at 8 o'clock and closes at 6 p.m.

Students can borrow up to three books at a time and keep them for two weeks. We must return them 3)________ (on) time. If we lose a book, we have to pay for it. Miss Li, the librarian, is very kind. She always helps us find the books we need 4)________ (quick).

Last week, I borrowed a book about Chinese history. I 5)________ (read) it every night after finishing my homework. I learned a lot of interesting facts and 6)________ (share) them with my classmates. Reading books makes me 7)________ (feel) happy and enriches my knowledge. I love our school library and I go there 8)________ (one) a week.

questions.analysis: 表示楼层用序数词，two的序数词是second（第二层）。
every morning表示经常性动作，主语it是第三人称单数，用opens。
on time是固定搭配，意为“按时、准时”。
副词修饰动词help，quick的副词形式是quickly。
Last week表示过去时间，read的过去式仍为read（发音不同）。
and连接并列谓语，learned是过去式，share也用过去式shared。
make sb. do sth.是固定搭配，后接动词原形feel。
once a week是固定表达，意为“一周一次”，表频率。

title: Protecting Wild Animals
passage:
Wild animals are our friends. They play an important role in nature. However, many wild animals 1)________ (become) in danger now because of human activities. Some people cut down trees, so animals lose their homes. Others hunt them for food or money.

We must do something 2)________ (protect) them. First, we should make laws to stop people from 3)________ (kill) wild animals. Second, we can build more nature reserves for them to live in. Third, it's necessary 4)________ (tell) more people about the importance of protecting wild animals.

I have a pet dog at home, and I love animals very much. Last month, I 5)________ (join) a club called “Animal Lovers”. We often go to the zoo to help take care of the animals there. I hope more and more people 6)________ (realize) that protecting wild animals is protecting ourselves. If everyone 7)________ (do) a little, the world will be a better place for animals.

questions.analysis: now表示动作正在发生，用现在进行时are becoming，强调“正处于濒危状态”。
不定式to protect作目的状语，意为“做一些事来保护它们”。
stop sb. from doing sth.是固定搭配，from后接动名词killing。
It's necessary to do sth.是固定句型，it作形式主语，不定式to tell作真正主语。
Last month表示过去时间，谓语动词用一般过去式joined。
hope后接宾语从句，表将来的愿望，用一般将来时will realize。
if引导的条件状语从句，遵循“主将从现”，主语everyone是第三人称单数，用does。

title: My First Online Class
passage:
In 2022, I had my first online class because of the COVID-19 pandemic. My teacher sent us a link 1)________ (on) WeChat, and we joined the class at 9 a.m. sharp.

At first, I was a little nervous. I didn't know how 2)________ (use) the online learning software. My mother helped me and taught me step by step. During the class, our teacher spoke slowly and clearly 3)________ (make) sure we could understand her. We could ask questions by typing in the chat box or raising our hands online. I asked my English teacher a question about grammar, and she answered me 4)________ (patient).

After the class, I felt it was interesting. Although we couldn't meet face to face, we still 5)________ (learn) a lot. I think online classes are a new way of learning. They are convenient and can save time on traveling to school. I 6)________ (take) more online classes if I have free time in the future.

questions.analysis: on WeChat是固定搭配，意为“在微信上”。
疑问词how+不定式作know的宾语，用to use。
不定式to make作目的状语，意为“说得慢且清晰是为了确保我们能听懂”。
副词修饰动词answered，patient的副词形式是patiently。
couldn't是过去式，并列谓语learn也用过去式learned。
in the future表示将来时间，用一般将来时will take。

title: The Spring Festival
passage:
The Spring Festival is the most important festival in China. It usually comes in January or February. Before the festival, people are busy 1)________ (clean) their houses and buying food. My parents always buy new clothes for me and my sister.

On New Year's Eve, all family members get together to have a big dinner. We eat dumplings, which are a symbol of good luck. After dinner, we watch the Spring Festival Gala on TV and talk happily. We also give red envelopes 2)________ (to) children for good luck. I love red envelopes because I can use the money 3)________ (buy) my favorite books.

On the first day of the New Year, we wear new clothes and visit our relatives. We say “Happy New Year” to each other and get best wishes. Last year, I 4)________ (receive) a lot of red envelopes and I 5)________ (visit) my grandparents in the countryside. They 6)________ (cook) a lot of delicious food for us. I think the Spring Festival is the 7)________ (happy) time of the year.

questions.analysis: be busy doing sth.是固定搭配，意为“忙于做某事”，用cleaning。
give sth. to sb.是固定搭配，意为“把某物给某人”。
use sth. to do sth.是固定搭配，意为“用某物做某事”，用to buy。
Last year表示过去时间，谓语动词用一般过去式received。
and连接并列谓语，received是过去式，visit也用过去式visited。
描述去年的动作，用一般过去式cooked。
the + 最高级 + of the year，happy的最高级是happiest，表“一年中最快乐的时光”。

title: Running for Health
passage:
Running is a popular sport around the world. It is cheap and easy to do. You just need a pair of comfortable sports shoes and you can run anywhere, such as in the park, on the street or even in your neighborhood.

I start running every morning 1)________ (since) last month. At first, I could only run for 10 minutes. I felt tired and wanted to give up. But my father encouraged me and ran with me every day. Now I 2)________ (can) run for 30 minutes without stopping. I feel much 3)________ (healthy) than before. My mother says running makes me 4)________ (look) stronger and more energetic.

Running is good for our physical and mental health. It can help us keep fit and reduce stress. Last week, I 5)________ (take) part in a running race in our school. I ran as fast as I could and 6)________ (win) the third prize. I was very excited and proud of myself. I 7)________ (keep) running every day because I want to be a better runner. I believe that 8)________ (run) regularly will make my life better.

questions.analysis: since last month表示“自从上个月以来”，是现在完成时的时间标志（此处start用一般现在时表持续动作，since符合语境）。
Now表示现在的能力，用can（could表过去能力）。
than是比较级标志，healthy的比较级是healthier。
make sb. do sth.固定搭配，后接动词原形look。
Last week表示过去时间，用一般过去式took（take part in意为“参加”）。
and连接并列谓语，ran是过去式，win也用过去式won。
because引导的原因状语从句表将来意愿，主句用一般将来时will keep。
动名词running作主语，表“规律跑步这件事”。

title: A Trip to the Beach
passage:
Last summer vacation, I went to the beach with my family. We drove there early in the morning and it 1)________ (take) us two hours to get there. When we arrived, the sun was shining brightly and the sea was blue and beautiful.

First, we put down our things and walked on the soft sand. I picked up some colorful shells and my little brother built a sandcastle. Then we went swimming in the sea. The water was warm and 2)________ (relax). My father taught me how to surf, but it was a little difficult. I tried many times and finally I 3)________ (can) stand on the surfboard for a few seconds.

At noon, we had a picnic on the beach. We ate sandwiches, fruits and seafood. The seafood was 4)________ (fresh) than what we buy in the city. After lunch, we played beach volleyball with some other tourists. We laughed a lot and had a great time.

In the afternoon, we watched the sunset by the sea. It was the most beautiful sunset I 5)________ (see) in my life. Before we left, I took a lot of photos 6)________ (remember) the happy moment. This trip was 7)________ (wonder) and I want to go to the beach again next summer.

questions.analysis: It takes sb. some time to do sth.句型，Last summer vacation表过去，take用过去式took。
形容词修饰water（物），relaxing表示“令人放松的”（relaxed修饰人）。
tried是过去式，“能站在冲浪板上”是过去的能力，用could。
than是比较级标志，fresh的比较级是fresher。
看到最美日落发生在过去的过去（看日落是过去时，此前从未见过更美的），用过去完成时had seen。
不定式to remember作目的状语，意为“拍照是为了记住美好时刻”。
was是系动词，后接形容词作表语，wonder的形容词是wonderful。

title: Planting Trees on Arbor Day
passage:
March 12th is Arbor Day in China. It's a day for people to plant trees. Planting trees is good for the environment because trees can make the air 1)________ (clean) and reduce pollution.

Last Arbor Day, our class went to a park to plant trees. Our teacher divided us into groups of four. Each group had to dig a hole, put a young tree into it and fill the hole with soil. At first, I didn't know how 2)________ (dig) a hole. My deskmate Tom taught me and we worked together. It was hard work but we felt happy. We 3)________ (water) the trees after planting them. Our teacher told us that trees 4)________ (need) enough water to grow well.

I planted two small trees that day. I hope they 5)________ (grow) into big trees in a few years. Now I go to the park to see my trees every month. I water them if it 6)________ (not rain) for a long time. I think everyone should plant trees because it's our duty 7)________ (protect) the earth. A greener earth means a healthier life for us.

questions.analysis: make the air cleaner表示“使空气更干净”，暗含比较（种树前后），用比较级cleaner。
疑问词how+不定式作know的宾语，用to dig。
Last Arbor Day表示过去时间，用一般过去式watered。
宾语从句描述客观事实，用一般现在时，主语trees是复数，用need。
in a few years表示将来时间，用一般将来时will grow。
if引导的条件状语从句，遵循“主将从现”，主语it是第三人称单数，否定式用doesn't rain。
It's one's duty to do sth.是固定句型，it作形式主语，不定式to protect作真正主语。

title: My Favorite Hobby
passage:
Everyone has a hobby. My favorite hobby is reading books. I started reading when I was five years old. My mother 1)________ (buy) me a lot of picture books and read stories to me every night.

Now I read for an hour every day after school. I like reading different kinds of books, such as fairy tales, science fiction and biographies. Reading makes me 2)________ (know) more about the world. When I read, I forget my problems and feel relaxed. Last month, I read a book about Marie Curie. She is a great scientist and her story 3)________ (teach) me to work hard and never give up.

I often go to the bookstore to buy new books or borrow them from the library. Last week, I 4)________ (borrow) a book about space from the library. I 5)________ (read) it for three days and I will finish it tomorrow. My best friend Lily also likes reading. We often share our favorite books and talk about them. She 6)________ (recommend) a new book to me yesterday and I want to read it this weekend.

I think reading is the 7)________ (good) hobby. It not only makes me happy but also improves my writing skills. I 8)________ (keep) reading for the rest of my life.

questions.analysis: when I was five years old表示过去时间，用一般过去式bought。
make sb. do sth.固定搭配，后接动词原形know。
描述客观事实，主语her story是第三人称单数，用一般现在时teaches。
Last week表示过去时间，用一般过去式borrowed。
for three days是现在完成时的时间标志，用have read（表动作持续到现在）。
yesterday表示过去时间，用一般过去式recommended。
the + 最高级，good的最高级是best，表“最好的爱好”。
for the rest of my life表示将来时间，用一般将来时will keep。

title: Helping My Mom Cook
passage:
My mom is a great cook. She makes delicious food for my family every day. Last Sunday, I decided to help her cook dinner because she was tired after work.

First, I washed the vegetables carefully. My mom told me to cut the tomatoes into small pieces, but I cut them 1)________ (slow) because I was afraid of cutting my fingers. Then I helped her cook eggs with tomatoes, which is my favorite dish. My mom taught me how 2)________ (fry) eggs well. She said the oil must be hot enough before putting the eggs in the pan.

While my mom was cooking soup, I set the table with bowls and chopsticks. I also put some flowers on the table to make it look nicer. When dinner was ready, my father and my brother 3)________ (come) home. They were surprised to see the food I cooked. My father said it was 4)________ (delicious) than usual. I felt very proud and happy.

After dinner, I cleaned the dishes and the kitchen. My mom thanked me and said I 5)________ (grow) up. I think helping my parents do housework is meaningful. It can make them feel relaxed and show my love to them. I 6)________ (help) my mom cook more often in the future.

questions.analysis: 副词修饰动词cut，slow的副词形式是slowly。
疑问词how+不定式作taught的宾语，用to fry。
描述上周日的动作，用一般过去式came。
than是比较级标志，delicious的比较级是more delicious。
“长大”的动作到妈妈说的时候已经完成，用现在完成时have grown（said是过去时，此处强调对现在的影响）。
in the future表示将来时间，用一般将来时will help。

title: A Rainy Day
passage:
Yesterday was a rainy day. I woke up early and heard the rain 1)________ (beat) against the window. I looked out and saw the streets were wet and people were walking with umbrellas.

I couldn't go out to play basketball with my friends as planned, so I decided to stay at home and read a book. My mom made hot milk for me and I sat on the sofa, reading a storybook about adventures. The story was so interesting that I 2)________ (forget) the time. When I finished the book, it was already noon. I helped my mom make noodles for lunch. The hot noodles made me feel warm on the cold rainy day.

In the afternoon, the rain stopped and the sun came out. I went out to the park with my dog. The air was fresh and the grass was green. I saw some children 3)________ (play) on the swing and they laughed happily. My dog ran around and chased a butterfly. I took a walk and enjoyed the beautiful scenery. I found that a rainy day can be 4)________ (enjoy) too if you have a good mood.

When I got home, I wrote a diary about the day. I 5)________ (learn) that life is full of small joys, even on a rainy day. I 6)________ (always remember) this special rainy day.

questions.analysis: hear sb./sth. doing sth.表示“听到某物正在做某事”，用beating（强调雨敲打窗户的动作正在进行）。
描述昨天的动作，用一般过去式forgot。
see sb. doing sth.表示“看到某人正在做某事”，用playing（强调看到孩子们正在荡秋千）。
be动词后接形容词作表语，enjoy的形容词是enjoyable（令人愉快的）。
描述昨天的感悟，用一般过去式learned。
表将来的意愿，用一般将来时will always remember（会永远记住这一天）。
